default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Initial consultation between Damon Danieli (Tikr) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss AI-driven marketing strategies for Tikr's mobile app.](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tikr is a mobile app connecting social media influencers with followers for paid micro-engagements](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Marcel demonstrated AI-powered content generation techniques using personas and voice/tone analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Damon aims to create highly personalized outreach campaigns using AI to analyze and mimic influencers' voices](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [The discussion explored innovative ways to segment audiences and craft tailored messaging at scale](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Topics

### Tikr App Overview

  - [iOS app for social media influencers to monetize their audience through paid micro-engagements](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Targets 18-32 year old creators with 10k-1M YouTube subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [On-demand calling feature distinguishes it from scheduled consultation platforms](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Self-funded by Damon, with recent fundraising for customer acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### AI-Driven Company Vision

  - [Goal to become a fully AI-operated company with minimal human involvement](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Using interns to build infrastructure for email campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Aiming to create AI-driven processes for all aspects of operations](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Audience Segmentation Strategy

  - [Plan to develop 32 distinct audience segments/personas](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Personalized agents will reach out to each segment with tailored messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Custom landing pages and in-app experiences based on user persona](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Content Generation Techniques

  - [Marcel demonstrated using famous personas (e.g. Deadpool) as anchors for voice/tone](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Showed how to analyze YouTube transcripts to capture an influencer's unique style](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Discussed creating cohort-based personalized outreach vs. traditional email campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

### Website and SEO Plans

  - [Current site redirects to App Store; plan to develop full website](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Goal to optimize individual user pages for SEO to attract organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Investor Outreach

  - [Interest in using AI to identify and personalize outreach to potential investors](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Leveraging company's AI-driven approach as a key selling point](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Damon to experiment with persona-based content generation techniques demonstrated by Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Team to explore deeper analysis of individual influencers' motivations and intents to inform outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Compare AI-generated outreach messages to current process outputs](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Damon and Marcel to discuss potential ongoing engagement/consulting arrangement](https://fathom.video/share/Vwxy-LjsonNgm9TNW4i9YCk4CKzTfTAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

action_items.description: Create sample email outreach using recipient's own voice and style, and send to Damon for review. Provide feedback on email outreach approach
Send transcript of call and links to workflows to Damon
